description: This file provides utility functions to access the Zod validation library within a backend environment configured as ECMAScript Modules (ESM). It exports functions to obtain Zod both synchronously and asynchronously, facilitating compatibility with different callsites.

methods.name: getZodSync()
methods.description: Returns an object containing the Zod module for synchronous use in an ESM environment.

methods.name: getZod()
methods.description: Asynchronous function returning an object with the Zod module, maintaining compatibility with existing async callsites.
